finish.title: Choose a name for the device

reset.description:
{name} ({model} at {host}) is locked. You need to unlock the device in order to authenticate and complete the configuration. Instructions:
1. Open the Broadlink app.
2. Select the device.
3. Select `...` in the upper right.
4. Scroll to the bottom of the page.
5. Disable the lock.
reset.title: Unlock the device

unlock.description: {name} ({model} at {host}) is locked. This can lead to authentication problems in Home Assistant. Would you like to unlock it?
unlock.title: Unlock the device (optional)

data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your Broadlink device.

frequency_not_supported.message: Broadlink devices cannot transmit on {frequency} MHz

learn_command.description: Learns a command or a list of commands from a device.

alternative.description: If code must be stored as an alternative. This is useful for discrete codes. Discrete codes are used for toggles that only perform one function. For example, a code to only turn a device on. If it is on already, sending the code won't change the state.
alternative.name: Alternative

command.description: A single command or a list of commands to learn.
command.name: Command

command_type.description: The type of command to be learned.
command_type.name: Command type

device.description: Device ID to learn command from.
device.name: Device

frequency.description: Only for RF command type. Specify the frequency of the command to learn. When disabled, a frequency sweep will attempt to detect the command frequency.
frequency.name: Frequency

timeout.description: Timeout for the command to be learned.
timeout.name: Timeout

learn_command.name: Learn command
